title: staging_diversity_slot_v0 — loose capture of one /api/diversity/{slot} payload
description: Staging payload: the raw JSON returned by /api/diversity/{slot}, captured verbatim under payload.body, with the slot name echoed for indexability. Schema is intentionally permissive (additionalProperties: true) — promote to a normalized schema (one per slot type) once the shape stabilises.

body.description: Raw JSON document from the slot endpoint.
